common.metaDescription: A personal goal management system to help you achieve your dreams.
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.
common.dateRangeInvalid: End date cannot be earlier than start date
common.signOutConfirmDesc: Signing out won't delete any data. You can sign in to this account anytime.

errors.goal_limit_reached: You already have 5 active goals. Too many goals dilute attention—consider finishing or archiving one before creating a new goal.
errors.invalid_date_range: End date cannot be earlier than start date
errors.missing_ai_key: AI API key is not configured
errors.operation_failed: Operation failed, please try again later
errors.image_type_invalid: Only PNG, JPG and WebP are supported
errors.image_upload_failed: Image upload failed, please try again

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Capture now, process later.
inbox.summaryHint: Summary preview of recent ideas. The actionable list is below.
inbox.listHint: Each item below supports Convert / Archive / Delete.
inbox.convertDisabledNoGoal: Create at least one active goal before converting this idea.

hero.title: Don't just set goals. Spark a flow.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered micro-quests, variable rewards, and immersive focus. The personal growth OS that makes consistency addictive.

visual.userInput: I want to become more confident...
visual.questDesc: Today, say "Thank you" to a cashier with a genuine smile. Observe their reaction.

focus.title: AI Reverse Engineering
focus.desc: Don't know where to start? Tell AI your vague ambition, and it breaks it down into fun, 5-minute micro-quests.

growth.title: Variable Rewards
growth.desc: Forget boring checkboxes. Unlock surprise loot boxes, rare badges, and watch your 'Goal Creature' evolve.

insight.title: Zen Mode Focus
insight.desc: Immersive full-screen execution with ambient soundscapes. Turn every action into a deep flow state experience.

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email and password to login

errors.email_not_confirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
errors.auth_code_error: Invalid or expired verification link, please try again
errors.auth_service_unreachable: Login service is temporarily unavailable. Please check your network and try again.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.description: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgot.success: Reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
forgot.error: Failed to send. Please try again later.

errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.error: Update failed. Please try again later.
reset.sameAsOld: New password must be different from old password
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset.needUpper: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
reset.needLower: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
reset.needNumber: Password must include at least one number
reset.needSymbol: Password must include at least one special character
reset.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.successMessage: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm your account.

messages.registration_success: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm your account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.dailyScoreDesc: Take 10 seconds to reflect and close the feedback loop.
dashboard.streakRule: Calculated in your timezone: completing any action on a day counts for the streak. If you have not completed one yet today, the streak remains at yesterday's value.
dashboard.recentTrendDesc: Spot patterns and keep improving with intention.
dashboard.noCoreAction: No core action set for today.

welcome.startJourney: Let's start your journey to flow.
welcome.readyToFocus: Ready to focus on what matters?

onboarding.heroTitle: Every great journey begins with a single step.
onboarding.heroDesc: Define your first long-term goal and let FlowSpark break it down into actionable micro-quests.

planning.title: Ready for today?
planning.desc: You are tracking {count} active goals. What's your main focus today?
planning.aiPlanDurationHint: These options show the estimated time you want to invest right now.
planning.weeklyInsightEmpty: No weekly insight has been generated yet.
planning.weeklyInsightRefreshHint: Results are reused for 7 days and refreshed automatically after that. You can also regenerate anytime.

stats.heatmapDesc: Visualize your daily efforts throughout the year.

rules.title: Level System
rules.desc: Gain XP by completing actions and maintaining streaks.

today.title: Today's Actions
today.overloadTip: When actions are many, focus on {max} items today
today.addActionIntroDesc: Actions need to belong to a goal. Create one to track progress and insights.
today.goalCreatedAutoselected: Goal created and preselected for you
addActionIntroPoints: Attach actions to a goal for clearer progress
today.aiAdoptedHint: This action comes from an AI recommendation that has been adopted

goals.title: Goals
goals.noGoals: You haven't set any goals yet.

category.label: Category
category.customHint: Categories are stored on goals. To remove a category, change goals that use it. It disappears when no goals use it.
category.replaceConfirm: Replace this category for all goals? This cannot be undone.

new.title: Create New Goal
new.aiSplitHint: Draft only. Nothing is created until you submit.
new.richtextPasteHint: Supports image upload and screenshot paste (PNG/JPG/WebP, max 5MB)
new.wait_upload_complete: Image is uploading, please submit after upload finishes.
new.subItemsEmptyHint: Add manually, or import AI breakdown as sub-items
new.confirmDiscardChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
new.successCriteriaPlaceholder: How will you know you've achieved it?

detail.archiveConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to archive this goal? It will be moved to the archive list.
detail.inspirationNotePlaceholder: Source / why it matters / next step (optional)
detail.journeyNotePlaceholder: What happened / how you felt / next step (optional)

profile.title: Profile
profile.accountSecurityDesc: Manage account access and sensitive operations.
profile.aiAnalyticsDesc: See which kinds of AI suggestions help you most, what you are more likely to adopt, and what the system has suggested recently.
profile.aiAnalyticsPurposePoint1: Find which AI scenes work best for you (more likely to adopt and complete).
profile.aiAnalyticsPurposePoint2: Replay a single suggestion and understand why it appeared.
profile.aiAnalyticsPurposePoint3: Give feedback so the system can fit you better over time.
profile.aiAnalyticsScenePurposePoint1: Start with adoption/completion rate to see if this scene is actually useful for you.
profile.aiAnalyticsScenePurposePoint2: Use “View detail” to replay a suggestion and leave “useful / not useful” feedback.
profile.aiAnalyticsSceneDesc: Start here to see which types of AI suggestions are actually useful for you.
profile.aiAnalyticsRecentDesc: Shows your latest suggestions, their current status, and an entry to replay each one.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionDesc: Based on your recent feedback (you can leave more feedback in the replay).
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionEmpty: Not enough feedback yet. Open any replay, tap “Not useful”, and pick a reason so the system can adapt.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionSuggestionNoTime: Next time choose a 5/10-minute option and do a single “starting move” to build momentum.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionSuggestionTooHard: Break it into one smaller step and adopt the “minimum viable” version first.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionSuggestionNotFit: Make sure your goals/actions are up to date; choose a more specific reason in feedback so the system can adapt.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionSuggestionAlreadyPlan: Turn your plan into a concrete action so the system can suggest a better next step.
profile.aiAnalyticsFrictionSuggestionOther: Pick a more specific reason in the replay so the system can adjust more accurately.
profile.aiAnalyticsTechnicalDesc: These are technical reference details that explain how the system generated suggestions. Most users can ignore them.
profile.aiAnalyticsTotalHelp: How many AI suggestions the system gave you in this period.
profile.aiAnalyticsAdoptionRateHelp: How often you chose to follow or continue with the suggestion.
profile.aiAnalyticsCompletionRateHelp: How often those suggestions were eventually completed.
profile.aiAnalyticsFallbackRateHelp: How often the system used a rule fallback instead of the main AI result.
profile.aiAnalyticsEmpty: There is not enough AI recommendation data yet.
profile.aiAnalyticsDetailEmpty: There is no AI suggestion replay to show yet.
profile.aiAnalyticsDetailMoreDesc: Includes scene overview, recent history, and technical reference.
profile.name: Name
profile.uploadErrorType: Only PNG, JPG, WebP formats are supported
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
profile.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
profile.deleteAcknowledge: I understand this will permanently delete my account and data.

potential.title: Potential Discovery
potential.subtitle: Describe your background and focus area to generate a practical potential profile and actions.
potential.profilePlaceholder: e.g. role, stage, strengths, current bottlenecks...
potential.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Improve product+engineering influence in 3 months
potential.targetPlaceholder: Select a goal for instant action creation
potential.emptyResultHint: Generate your first profile to unlock instant actions and history.

verified.title: Email Verified Successfully
verified.description: Your email has been verified. Redirecting you...
